subcodes.first_line: Immeasurable praise, sanctified from peer or likeness, befitteth the Lord of existence Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد بیزوال مقدس از اشباه و امثال مالک وجودیرا لایق و سزاست که اشیای عالم را
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity in diversity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
